clusters.rationale: All manager stories import through the theming module; the addition of __agentEvalMarker in theming/index.ts causes every manager story to appear in the affected set.
All addon stories (a11y, docs, pseudo-states, vitest, onboarding, actions) transitively import from theming/index.ts, making them affected by the marker constant addition.
Component-testing stories share the same theming import graph and are flagged solely because of the new __agentEvalMarker export in theming/index.ts.

Catch-all for remaining core UI component stories (Button, Select, Overlay, Toolbar, Tabs, Tooltip, Highlight, Controls, etc.) that are affected via the same theming/index.ts import cascade from the comment-only marker addition.
